---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for POtoOrder
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem It Solves

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it valuable? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How would this feature work? Describe the user experience. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or features? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature -->

## Priority

<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->

- [ ] Critical (blocks our use of POtoOrder)
- [ ] High (would significantly improve our workflow)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (small quality-of-life improvement)

## Willingness to Contribute

<!-- Would you be willing to help implement this feature? -->

- [ ] I can submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help test this feature
- [ ] I can provide feedback during development
- [ ] I need the POtoOrder team to implement this
